variant_name: 高令宁 — 夜审决裂时
trigger: 高府厢房事件后，正厅夜审中被沈词再次认定恶毒，旧日冤屈集中爆发并当场掌掴对方。

appearance_delta.face: 情绪激烈时眼眶泛红，神色锋利到近乎灼人，压抑已久的痛楚与愤怒完全外露。
appearance_delta.body: 因怀孕而不宜剧烈动作，但站姿仍强撑笔直，带有摇摇欲坠又绝不服输的对抗感。
appearance_delta.hair: 夜间奔波与争执后发髻稍乱，鬓发散落，失去白日养胎时的温和整洁。
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 泛红眼尾、凌乱衣角、冷怒神情与甩巴掌后的决绝姿态，体现裂痕彻底不可逆。

costume_override.outfit: 晚间在娘家穿着的端庄家常妇人装，外层披衣或披帛略有凌乱，仍保留孕期宽松剪裁。

visual_reference: ancient Chinese noblewoman in a tense night confrontation inside a traditional hall, pale cool skin, oval face, sharp brows, almond eyes reddened with fury and grievance, black hair in a married updo slightly disheveled with loose side strands, slim pregnant figure in dark teal and moon-white hanfu with soft layers, standing rigidly after slapping someone, lamplight, witnesses in the background, intense dramatic Chinese period drama atmosphere
